overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking from a lakeside through a wooden fortification, across a crowded bridge, and into a refugee camp on a gloomy overcast morning.

events.description: approaching the wooden palisade gate from the lakeside

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the lakeshore toward the fortification gate

notable_agents.action: guards standing at the gate entrance watching the approach

entered.detail: small wooden fishing boat with yellow sail beached on the shore
calm lake water reflecting the overcast sky with distant shoreline
large wooden fortification gate with stone foundations and red banners
castle visible across the lake through the morning haze
leafless trees along the shoreline indicating late autumn

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a lakeshore toward a wooden fortification gate. A small boat rests on the shore to the left, and a distant castle is visible across the water through the haze.

events.description: passing through the wooden gate into the torch-lit interior
moving from natural outdoor light into warm torch-lit stone corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the gate passage and into the military camp interior

notable_agents.action: armored guard holding a torch stands by the stone wall
guard in red armor and helmet standing at attention

entered.detail: rough stone wall of the fortification passage
heavy wooden beams and frame of the gate overhead
burning torches mounted on walls providing warm orange light
wooden structure with red awning inside the fort courtyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the heavy wooden gate into a torch-lit stone passage. Guards in red armor stand watch as the scene transitions from the open lakeside to the enclosed fort interior.

events.description: path curves slightly right toward the watchtower

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt path toward a wooden watchtower

notable_agents.action: guard carrying a torch walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: tall wooden watchtower with roof and guards posted on top
tall sharpened wooden stakes forming the fort wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path lined with wooden palisades, approaching a tall watchtower. The guard ahead carries a torch, illuminating the bare trees surrounding the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to exit gate with gallows

events.description: approaching the exit gate with hanging ropes visible overhead
passing through the exit gate onto the wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past the watchtower and through the far gate of the fort

notable_agents.action: group of refugees approaching from the bridge direction

entered.detail: wooden gate frame with horizontal beam and hanging ropes
thick ropes with nooses hanging from the gate beam
murky swamp water visible through gaps in the wooden fence

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the watchtower and approaches the exit gate where ropes hang from the beam. Refugees are visible approaching from the bridge beyond as the path leads toward the swamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded wooden bridge over swamp water

events.description: stepping onto the wooden bridge crowded with refugees
crowd density increases with villagers sitting on the bridge sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt pushing through the dense crowd of refugees on the narrow wooden bridge

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress sitting on the bridge edge looking distressed
elderly man with white hair leaning on the bridge railing

entered.detail: long wooden plank bridge with rope railings stretching over the swamp
broken wooden carts and debris submerged in the swamp water
watchtowers visible in the distance across the misty swamp

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a long wooden bridge packed with refugees. The swamp stretches out on both sides with submerged wreckage visible in the water, while villagers sit and stand along the bridge edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: refugee camp with tents and temporary shelters

events.description: leaving the bridge and entering the muddy refugee camp area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the muddy refugee camp past tents and campfires

notable_agents.action: guard in armor standing near a yellow tent entrance

entered.detail: large beige canvas tents set up as temporary shelters
burning campfire with orange flames near the tents
unfinished wooden structures and debris scattered around

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a muddy refugee camp with canvas tents and campfires. The ground is wet and churned, with wooden scaffolding and temporary structures lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a hazy lakeshore through a fortified military outpost and across a crowded bridge into a muddy refugee camp. It begins with Geralt walking along the water's edge past a small boat toward a wooden fortification gate, where the open landscape narrows into a torch-lit stone passage guarded by soldiers in red armor. The scene then shifts to a dirt path lined with palisades and bare trees, moving past a tall watchtower before reaching an exit gate where ropes hang from the beams. As the camera emerges from the fort, it follows Geralt across a long wooden bridge packed with villagers, with the surrounding swamp and submerged wreckage opening up on either side. Finally, the path leads away from the bridge and descends into a bleak camp of canvas tents and campfires set upon wet, churned mud and temporary wooden scaffolding.
